hooks.command: sh -c 'H="$HEXA"; [ -x "$H" ] || H="$HOME/.hx/bin/hexa"; [ -x "$H" ] || H=$(command -v hexa) || exit 0; exec "$H" run "$@"' _ ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/_walkie_arm.hexa arm
sh -c 'H="$HEXA"; [ -x "$H" ] || H="$HOME/.hx/bin/hexa"; [ -x "$H" ] || H=$(command -v hexa) || exit 0; exec "$H" run "$@"' _ ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/_walkie_arm.hexa deliver
